title: Case in select
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_status_label/0` that selects each post along with a synthetic `status` string: `"published"` if `p.published == true`, otherwise `"draft"`. Use `fragment("CASE WHEN ? THEN 'published' ELSE 'draft' END", p.published)` with a pinned nothing (the boolean is already columnar). Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: CASE is a legitimate fragment use case (no typed equivalent). Must use `?` placeholder for the column reference.
